LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. (SEE CCP 704.225.) THE LEVYING OFFICER SHALL RELEASE $1,000 TO THE PLAINTIFF CREDITOR. ANY AND ALL OTHER FUNDS HELD BY THE LEVYING OFFICER SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE DEFENDANT DEBTOR. THE COURT SHALL PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The judgment debtor's claim of exemption is granted in part. (See CCP 704.225.) The levying officer shall release $1,000 to the plaintiff creditor. Any and all other funds held by the levying officer shall be released to the defendant debtor.

The Court shall prepare an order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
